_comment: The noun dictionary as DATA. One row per word, every fact in one place — gender (source of truth; article is derived), the English hint, thematic category, declension facts (animacy/plural/pluralPattern/pluralOnly/weakMasculine/place), plus enrichment for quests + the story generator: level (difficulty gate), tags (topic grouping), and cefr/theme/frequency/exampleSentence (filled over time). Edit this file to add or enrich vocabulary — no code change. data.ts loads + validates it and re-derives the legacy PERSON_WORDS/PLURAL_ONLY/WEAK_MASCULINE/PLACE_WORDS sets from these fields.
